name: firstchurch/enews
description: First Church E-News: the enews_issue CPT + the email-safe render of an issue + Mailchimp push. The pure render/payload core (src/) is unit-tested; the Mailchimp SDK is a prod runtime dep, isolated via PHP-Scoper at build time. See ops/docs/enews-spine.md and ops/docs/composer-on-prod.md.
